recommendations.title: Who Would You Take to a Deserted Island?
recommendations.overview: On their last night together, four longtime flatmates' lives are suddenly upended when a secret is revealed during the course of an evening celebration.

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney works to get his teenage client acquitted of murdering his wealthy father.

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Without Saying Goodbye
recommendations.overview: The opposite lives of a workaholic architect and a fiery artist are upended when their chance encounter in breathtaking Peru shifts their views on life.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Cloudy Mountain
recommendations.overview: The opening of the new tunnel, which took ten years to build, coincided with a series of serious cataclysms. The lives of 160,000 people depend on the actions of two people, a father and a son.

recommendations.title: Passing
recommendations.overview: In 1920s New York City, a Black woman finds her world upended when her life becomes intertwined with a former childhood friend who's passing as white.

recommendations.title: Just Say Yes
recommendations.overview: Incurable romantic Lotte finds her life upended when her plans for a picture-perfect wedding unravel -- just as her self-absorbed sister gets engaged.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Giant Little Ones
recommendations.overview: Two popular teen boys, best friends since childhood, discover their lives, families, and girlfriends dramatically upended after an unexpected incident occurs on the night of a 17th birthday party.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.
